meaning_en: a building for people to live in

examples.en: We live in a big house.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi sống trong một ngôi nhà lớn.

common_mistakes.correct: I am at home.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng 'home' thay vì 'house' khi nói về nơi ở nói chung.

meaning_en: the place where one lives permanently

examples.en: I feel comfortable at home.
examples.vi: Tôi cảm thấy thoải mái ở nhà.

common_mistakes.correct: I go home.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Không dùng 'to' trước 'home' khi nói về hướng đi.

meaning_en: a part of a building enclosed by walls

examples.en: This room is very bright.
examples.vi: Căn phòng này rất sáng.

common_mistakes.correct: I have a small room.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Tính từ đứng trước danh từ.

meaning_en: a room where food is prepared and cooked

examples.en: She is cooking in the kitchen.
examples.vi: Cô ấy đang nấu ăn trong bếp.

common_mistakes.correct: I am in the kitchen.

meaning_en: a room for sleeping in

examples.en: My bedroom is upstairs.
examples.vi: Phòng ngủ của tôi ở trên lầu.

common_mistakes.correct: I have a two-bedroom house.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng dạng ghép với dấu gạch ngang.

meaning_en: a room containing a bath or shower

examples.en: The bathroom is down the hall.
examples.vi: Phòng tắm ở cuối hành lang.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need to go to bathroom.
common_mistakes.correct: I need to go to the bathroom.

meaning_en: a room in a house for general everyday use

examples.en: We watch TV in the living room.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi xem TV ở phòng khách.

common_mistakes.correct: I am in the living room.

meaning_en: a room where meals are eaten

examples.en: The dining room has a large table.
examples.vi: Phòng ăn có một cái bàn lớn.

common_mistakes.correct: We eat in the dining room.

meaning_en: a piece of ground used for growing flowers, vegetables, etc.

examples.en: I love spending time in the garden.
examples.vi: Tôi thích dành thời gian trong vườn.

common_mistakes.correct: I have a small garden.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Tính từ đứng trước danh từ.

meaning_en: a building for keeping a car in

examples.en: He parked the car in the garage.
examples.vi: Anh ấy đỗ xe trong nhà để xe.

common_mistakes.correct: The car is in the garage.

meaning_en: the lower surface of a room; a level of a building

examples.en: The floor is made of wood.
examples.vi: Sàn nhà làm bằng gỗ.

common_mistakes.correct: I live on the first floor.

meaning_en: a solid vertical structure that divides or encloses an area

examples.en: The walls are painted white.
examples.vi: Những bức tường được sơn trắng.

common_mistakes.wrong: There is a picture on wall.
common_mistakes.correct: There is a picture on the wall.

meaning_en: an opening in a wall fitted with glass

examples.en: Please open the window.
examples.vi: Làm ơn mở cửa sổ.

common_mistakes.correct: I look out the window.

meaning_en: a movable barrier at the entrance to a building or room

examples.en: Please close the door.
examples.vi: Làm ơn đóng cửa.

common_mistakes.correct: Knock on the door.

meaning_en: the top covering of a building

examples.en: The roof needs repairing.
examples.vi: Mái nhà cần được sửa.

common_mistakes.wrong: The roof of house is red.
common_mistakes.correct: The roof of the house is red.

meaning_en: a set of steps leading from one floor to another

examples.en: Be careful on the stairs.
examples.vi: Cẩn thận trên cầu thang.

common_mistakes.correct: I go up the stairs.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng số nhiều và mạo từ.

meaning_en: objects such as chairs, tables, beds, etc.

examples.en: We need new furniture.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi cần đồ nội thất mới.

common_mistakes.correct: I bought a piece of furniture.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Furniture là danh từ không đếm được.

meaning_en: a piece of cloth hung to cover a window

examples.en: Please draw the curtains.
examples.vi: Làm ơn kéo rèm.

common_mistakes.correct: Draw the curtain.

meaning_en: a floor covering made of thick woven fabric

examples.en: The carpet is very soft.
examples.vi: Tấm thảm rất mềm.

common_mistakes.wrong: I have a carpet in living room.
common_mistakes.correct: I have a carpet in the living room.

meaning_en: a platform projecting from the wall of a building

examples.en: I have breakfast on the balcony.
examples.vi: Tôi ăn sáng trên ban công.

common_mistakes.correct: I stand on the balcony.

meaning_en: a structure that encloses an area

examples.en: We built a wooden fence around the garden.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi xây hàng rào gỗ quanh vườn.

common_mistakes.correct: We built a fence.

meaning_en: a movable barrier at an entrance

examples.en: Please close the gate when you leave.
examples.vi: Làm ơn đóng cổng khi bạn ra ngoài.

common_mistakes.wrong: I opened the door of the garden.
common_mistakes.correct: I opened the garden gate.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Gate là cổng vườn, không phải door.

meaning_en: a way or track laid down for walking

examples.en: There is a stone path from the gate to the house.
examples.vi: Có một lối đi bằng đá từ cổng vào nhà.

common_mistakes.wrong: I walked on the road to the house.
common_mistakes.correct: I walked on the path to the house.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Path là lối đi nhỏ, road là đường lớn.

meaning_en: a short road leading from a public road to a house or garage

examples.en: He parked his car in the driveway.
examples.vi: Anh ấy đỗ xe ở đường lái xe vào nhà.

common_mistakes.wrong: I parked on the street in front of my house.
common_mistakes.correct: I parked in the driveway.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Driveway là lối đi riêng vào nhà, không phải đường phố.

meaning_en: a paved outdoor area adjoining a house

examples.en: We have breakfast on the patio in summer.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi ăn sáng trên sân hiên vào mùa hè.

common_mistakes.correct: We sat on the patio.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Patio là sân hiên ở tầng trệt, balcony là ban công trên cao.

meaning_en: a vertical channel for smoke from a fire

examples.en: Smoke rises from the chimney.
examples.vi: Khói bốc lên từ ống khói.

common_mistakes.wrong: The chimney is on top of the roof.
common_mistakes.correct: The chimney is on the roof.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Chimney nằm trên mái nhà, không phải 'on top of the roof'.

meaning_en: a space or room just below the roof

examples.en: We store old furniture in the attic.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi cất đồ đạc cũ trên gác xép.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the boxes in the basement.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the boxes in the attic.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Attic là trên cùng, basement là dưới tầng hầm.

meaning_en: a floor of a building partly or entirely below ground level

examples.en: The laundry room is in the basement.
examples.vi: Phòng giặt ở tầng hầm.

common_mistakes.wrong: The basement is under the ground.
common_mistakes.correct: The basement is below ground level.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Basement có thể một phần trên mặt đất, không hoàn toàn dưới lòng đất.

meaning_en: a room below ground level, used for storage

examples.en: They keep wine in the cellar.
examples.vi: Họ cất rượu trong hầm.

common_mistakes.wrong: I went to the basement to get wine.
common_mistakes.correct: I went to the cellar to get wine.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Cellar thường dùng cho hầm rượu, basement là tầng hầm nói chung.

meaning_en: a corridor in a building

examples.en: The bedrooms are at the end of the hallway.
examples.vi: Các phòng ngủ ở cuối hành lang.

common_mistakes.correct: I walked along the hallway.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Hallway là hành lang trong nhà, hall thường là sảnh lớn.

meaning_en: a level area at the top of a staircase or between flights of stairs

examples.en: There is a window on the landing.
examples.vi: Có một cửa sổ ở chiếu nghỉ cầu thang.

common_mistakes.correct: I stood on the landing.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Landing là nơi bằng phẳng, không phải bậc thang.

meaning_en: a fence-like barrier made of rails

examples.en: Hold the railing when you go down the stairs.
examples.vi: Nắm lan can khi bạn đi xuống cầu thang.

common_mistakes.correct: I grabbed the railing.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Railing thường là lan can có thanh dọc, handrail là tay vịn.

meaning_en: a covered entrance to a building

examples.en: She is sitting on the porch reading a book.
examples.vi: Cô ấy đang ngồi ở hiên nhà đọc sách.

common_mistakes.correct: I sat on the porch.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Porch là hiên ở tầng trệt, balcony là ban công trên cao.

meaning_vi: boong tàu, sàn gỗ ngoài trời
meaning_en: a wooden platform attached to a house

examples.en: We have a barbecue on the deck.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi tổ chức tiệc nướng trên sàn gỗ ngoài trời.

common_mistakes.correct: We sat on the deck.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Deck thường làm bằng gỗ và cao hơn mặt đất, patio là lát đá hoặc gạch.

meaning_en: a small building used for storage

examples.en: The garden tools are in the shed.
examples.vi: Dụng cụ làm vườn ở trong nhà kho.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the tools in the garage.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the tools in the shed.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Shed là nhà kho nhỏ trong vườn, garage là để xe.

meaning_en: a room where household equipment is kept

examples.en: The washing machine is in the utility room.
examples.vi: Máy giặt ở trong phòng tiện ích.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the washer in the bathroom.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the washer in the utility room.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Utility room là phòng riêng cho máy giặt, không phải phòng tắm.

meaning_en: a room used for reading, writing, or academic work

examples.en: He spends most of his time in his study.
examples.vi: Anh ấy dành hầu hết thời gian trong phòng làm việc.

common_mistakes.wrong: I work in my office at home.
common_mistakes.correct: I work in my study at home.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Study là phòng dành cho học tập và làm việc, office thường dùng cho công ty.

meaning_en: a room where clothes are washed and ironed

examples.en: The laundry room is next to the kitchen.
examples.vi: Phòng giặt ở cạnh bếp.

common_mistakes.wrong: I wash clothes in the bathroom.
common_mistakes.correct: I wash clothes in the laundry room.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Laundry room là phòng riêng cho giặt giũ.

meaning_en: a small room where food is stored

examples.en: We keep canned goods in the pantry.
examples.vi: Chúng tôi để đồ hộp trong phòng đựng thức ăn.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the food in the cupboard.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the food in the pantry.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Pantry là phòng nhỏ, cupboard là tủ.

meaning_en: a room with glass walls and roof, attached to a house

examples.en: She grows plants in the conservatory.
examples.vi: Cô ấy trồng cây trong nhà kính.

common_mistakes.wrong: I have a greenhouse in the garden.
common_mistakes.correct: I have a conservatory attached to the house.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Conservatory là phòng kính gắn liền nhà, greenhouse là nhà kính riêng trong vườn.

meaning_en: a soft object that you sit or lean on

examples.en: The sofa has three cushions.
examples.vi: Ghế sofa có ba cái đệm.

common_mistakes.wrong: I bought a cushion for my chair.
common_mistakes.correct: I bought a cushion for my chair.

meaning_en: a small carpet used to cover part of a floor

examples.en: There is a rug in front of the fireplace.
examples.vi: Có một tấm thảm trước lò sưởi.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put a rug on the wall.
common_mistakes.correct: I put a rug on the floor.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Rug là thảm trải sàn, không phải treo tường.

meaning_en: a large cupboard for storing clothes

examples.en: She hung her dress in the wardrobe.
examples.vi: Cô ấy treo váy trong tủ quần áo.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put my shoes in the wardrobe.
common_mistakes.correct: I put my shoes in the wardrobe.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Có thể dùng wardrobe để đựng giày, không sai.

meaning_en: a sliding compartment in a piece of furniture

examples.en: The keys are in the top drawer.
examples.vi: Chìa khóa ở ngăn kéo trên cùng.

common_mistakes.correct: I open the drawer.

meaning_en: a flat board used to hold items

examples.en: Put the books on the shelf.
examples.vi: Đặt sách lên kệ.

common_mistakes.wrong: There are many shelf in the room.
common_mistakes.correct: There are many shelves in the room.

meaning_en: a device that produces light

examples.en: She turned on the lamp.
examples.vi: Cô ấy bật đèn.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need a lamp for reading.
common_mistakes.correct: I need a lamp for reading.

meaning_en: a reflective surface used to see oneself

examples.en: He looked at himself in the mirror.
examples.vi: Anh ấy nhìn mình trong gương.

common_mistakes.correct: I look at the mirror.

meaning_en: a container for holding flowers

examples.en: She put flowers in the vase.
examples.vi: Cô ấy cắm hoa vào bình.

common_mistakes.wrong: I bought a vase for flowers.
common_mistakes.correct: I bought a vase for flowers.

meaning_en: an instrument that shows the time

examples.en: The clock on the wall is slow.
examples.vi: Đồng hồ trên tường chạy chậm.

common_mistakes.correct: I look at the clock.

meaning_en: a border that encloses a picture

examples.en: The photo is in a silver frame.
examples.vi: Bức ảnh ở trong khung bạc.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the picture in frame.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the picture in a frame.

meaning_en: a decorative object

examples.en: The shelf is full of ornaments.
examples.vi: Kệ đầy đồ trang trí.

common_mistakes.wrong: I bought an ornament for the tree.
common_mistakes.correct: I bought an ornament for the tree.

meaning_en: a living thing that grows in soil, often kept indoors

examples.en: I water the plants every morning.
examples.vi: Tôi tưới cây mỗi sáng.

common_mistakes.correct: I have many plants.

meaning_en: a container for waste

examples.en: Throw the paper in the bin.
examples.vi: Bỏ giấy vào thùng rác.

common_mistakes.correct: I put rubbish in the bin.

meaning_en: a device that controls the flow of water

examples.en: Please turn off the tap.
examples.vi: Làm ơn tắt vòi nước.

common_mistakes.correct: I turn on the tap.

meaning_en: a basin for washing dishes or hands

examples.en: She washed the dishes in the sink.
examples.vi: Cô ấy rửa bát trong bồn.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the glass in sink.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the glass in the sink.

meaning_en: a device that sprays water for bathing

examples.en: I take a shower every morning.
examples.vi: Tôi tắm vòi hoa sen mỗi sáng.

common_mistakes.correct: I have a shower.

meaning_en: a bowl-shaped fixture for using as a lavatory

examples.en: The toilet is in the bathroom.
examples.vi: Bồn cầu ở trong phòng tắm.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need to go to toilet.
common_mistakes.correct: I need to go to the toilet.

meaning_en: a large container for bathing in water

examples.en: She is taking a bath.
examples.vi: Cô ấy đang tắm bồn.

common_mistakes.correct: I take a bath every day.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng 'take a bath' thay vì 'bath' như động từ.

meaning_en: a device that heats a room

examples.en: The radiator keeps the room warm.
examples.vi: Bộ tản nhiệt giữ ấm phòng.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the clothes on radiator.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the clothes on the radiator.

meaning_en: a point on a wall where electrical appliances are plugged in

examples.en: Plug the charger into the outlet.
examples.vi: Cắm sạc vào ổ điện.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need an outlet for my phone.
common_mistakes.correct: I need an outlet for my phone.

meaning_en: a piece of glass that reflects images

examples.en: She checked her hair in the mirror.
examples.vi: Cô ấy kiểm tra tóc trước gương.

common_mistakes.correct: I saw in the mirror

meaning_en: a container used to hold cut flowers

examples.en: She put the roses in a vase.
examples.vi: Cô ấy đặt những bông hồng vào bình hoa.

common_mistakes.correct: vase of flowers
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng số nhiều 'flowers' khi nói về hoa trong bình

meaning_en: an instrument that shows the time

examples.en: The clock on the wall is ticking.
examples.vi: Đồng hồ trên tường đang tích tắc.

common_mistakes.correct: clock
common_mistakes.explain_vi: 'Watch' là đồng hồ đeo tay, 'clock' là đồng hồ treo/để bàn

meaning_en: a structure that holds a picture, window, or door

examples.en: He put the photo in a silver frame.
examples.vi: Anh ấy đặt ảnh vào khung bạc.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need a frame for my picture.
common_mistakes.correct: I need a frame for my picture.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Không có lỗi phổ biến đặc biệt

meaning_en: a decorative object

examples.en: The tree was covered with Christmas ornaments.
examples.vi: Cây được phủ đầy đồ trang trí Giáng sinh.

common_mistakes.correct: I don't have any ornaments.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng số nhiều 'ornaments' khi nói chung

meaning_en: a living organism that grows in soil

examples.en: I water my plants every morning.
examples.vi: Tôi tưới cây mỗi sáng.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need to water the plant.
common_mistakes.correct: I need to water the plants.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Thường dùng số nhiều khi có nhiều cây

meaning_en: a container for waste

examples.en: Throw the paper in the bin.
examples.vi: Bỏ giấy vào thùng rác.

common_mistakes.correct: I put it in the bin.

meaning_en: a device that controls the flow of liquid from a pipe

examples.en: Turn off the tap after washing your hands.
examples.vi: Tắt vòi nước sau khi rửa tay.

common_mistakes.correct: I turn on the tap.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Dùng 'turn on' thay vì 'open' cho vòi nước

meaning_en: a basin for washing dishes or hands

examples.en: He washed the dishes in the sink.
examples.vi: Anh ấy rửa bát trong bồn rửa.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the glass in sink.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the glass in the sink.

meaning_en: a device that sprays water for bathing

examples.en: I take a shower every morning.
examples.vi: Tôi tắm vòi hoa sen mỗi sáng.

common_mistakes.correct: I take a shower.

meaning_en: a bowl-shaped fixture for urination and defecation

examples.en: The toilet is in the bathroom.
examples.vi: Bồn cầu ở trong phòng tắm.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need to go to toilet.
common_mistakes.correct: I need to go to the toilet.

meaning_en: a large tub for soaking the body

examples.en: She had a relaxing bath.
examples.vi: Cô ấy đã tắm bồn thư giãn.

common_mistakes.correct: I take a bath.

meaning_en: a device that heats a room

examples.en: The radiator is making a noise.
examples.vi: Lò sưởi đang kêu.

common_mistakes.correct: I turned off the radiator.

meaning_en: a socket in a wall for connecting electrical devices

examples.en: Plug the charger into the outlet.
examples.vi: Cắm sạc vào ổ điện.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need an outlet to charge my phone.
common_mistakes.correct: I need an outlet to charge my phone.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Không có lỗi phổ biến đặc biệt

meaning_en: a cleaning tool with bristles and a long handle

examples.en: She swept the floor with a broom.
examples.vi: Cô ấy quét sàn bằng chổi.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need a broom to clean.
common_mistakes.correct: I need a broom to clean.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Không có lỗi phổ biến đặc biệt

meaning_en: a tool for cleaning floors with water

examples.en: He used a mop to clean the kitchen floor.
examples.vi: Anh ấy dùng cây lau nhà để lau sàn bếp.

common_mistakes.wrong: I mopped the floor with mop.
common_mistakes.correct: I mopped the floor with a mop.

meaning_en: a cylindrical container with a handle

examples.en: Fill the bucket with water.
examples.vi: Đổ đầy nước vào xô.

common_mistakes.wrong: I need a bucket to carry water.
common_mistakes.correct: I need a bucket to carry water.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Không có lỗi phổ biến đặc biệt

meaning_en: a pot for boiling water

examples.en: I boiled water in the kettle for tea.
examples.vi: Tôi đun nước trong ấm để pha trà.

common_mistakes.wrong: I put the kettle on for tea.
common_mistakes.correct: I put the kettle on for tea.
common_mistakes.explain_vi: Không có lỗi phổ biến đặc biệt

meaning_en: an appliance for browning bread

examples.en: I put two slices of bread in the toaster.
examples.vi: Tôi cho hai lát bánh mì vào máy nướng.

common_mistakes.correct: I toasted bread with a toaster.

meaning_en: an oven that cooks food quickly using electromagnetic waves

examples.en: Heat the soup in the microwave.
examples.vi: Hâm nóng súp trong lò vi sóng.

common_mistakes.correct: I put it in the microwave.
